qcSource: Author Test Cases - Copy and Paste.pdf

legend.automated: Verified in the authoring DOM by an it() block.
legend.deferred: Documented as it.skip() — requires Save/Publish, Reader (CLP), cross-program runs, undo, persistence, OS clipboard, or a11y flows outside the authoring DOM.

mappings.reason: Copy complex/nested components (Thumbs Card / Worked Example) — requires those widgets provisioned; nested integrity best verified in Preview/Reader
Save reused components — Save flow + server round trip outside the authoring DOM
Publish reused content — Publish flow outside the authoring DOM
Launch activity in CLP and verify reused content — Reader flow
Edit reused content and republish — Publish/Reader flow
Copy-paste parity across ELA / WL / MATH programs — multi-program runs
Undo after pasting — undo affordance not exposed in the authoring DOM here (runtime)
